backend/main.mo: Main actor defining user registration with unique auth codes, code-based authentication, user connections, and queries for users and connection status using Map-based storage.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old user data structure to new structure by adding authCode field (defaulting to '000000') and initializing sessions map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: automatic authentication after registration, simplified code-based login page, and removal of Internet Identity requirements from UI components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of 13 frontend files describing the code-based authentication system, routing, UI components, and styling configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for the application's design system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Code Chat application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining routes for landing, register, login, connect, and chat pages with shared layout containing header and footer.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright, caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking, and social media links for Twitter and GitHub.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header component with logo, navigation links, auth code display badge for authenticated users, and login/logout functionality using code-based authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages backend actor instances with optional Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCodeAuth.tsx: React context provider managing code-based authentication state with login/logout functions and persistent session storage in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for user operations including registration, connection, fetching all users, checking connection status, and retrieving users by code.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, including coral and teal color utilities for the application's warm color palette.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component into the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Displays a placeholder page indicating the chat feature is under development, requiring backend message storage and retrieval methods to be implemented.
frontend/src/pages/ConnectPage.tsx: Allows authenticated users to connect with others by entering their unique code, then redirects to chat upon successful connection.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page showcasing the app's features (simple registration, one-to-one chats, security) with a call-to-action button routing to login or connect.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login form where users enter their unique code to authenticate, with error handling and a link to the registration page.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: User registration page that collects a display name, generates a unique auth code, displays it with copy functionality, and automatically authenticates the user to navigate to the connect page.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palette (coral, teal, sidebar colors using oklch), border radius variables, typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document listing implemented features including code-based authentication, user registration, connection system, and real-time one-to-one chat with modern UI design.
